ssot_constraints: do not create a merged backend setup-workbook endpoint
use existing stage-specific setup-workbook endpoints for Organization Setup and Institution Setup
use the generic resource API plus backend-owned selector manifests for context discovery
do not hardcode Organization subscription statuses, Institution lifecycle statuses, resource aliases, field aliases, or role keys in frontend code
keep audit/commit boundaries separate per backend stage

partial_stage_completion_persisted.owner: SetupWorkbookWizardState and persisted local draft wizard fields

runtime_evidence_still_required: browser evidence that one guided experience appears only when generic context discovery makes it safe
browser evidence that Organization Setup is submitted before Institution Setup
browser/API evidence that Organization and Institution audit/commit boundaries remain separate
browser evidence that Stage A committed/Stage B pending state survives reload
live backend evidence that generic resource selector filtering returns the intended single visible Organization and Institution
